# SENTIENT

> SENTIENT is an AI-powered reasoning and mind-mapping canvas. Ask a question and it maps ideas, tensions, evidence, and synthesis into an interactive graph you can extend with thinking modes (Summarize, Critique, Brainstorm, Devil's advocate).

## Pages

- [Home](/): Ask a question and start a new reasoning map.
- [Canvas](/canvas): Interactive reasoning canvas with AI copilot, voice mode, memory, MCP connectors, and collaboration.
